---
title: "History of the Names of Men, Nations, and Places in their Connection with the Progress of Civilisation tr. L. H. Mordacque"
---

## History of the Names of Men, Nations, and Places in their Connection with the Progress of Civilisation tr. L. H. Mordacque

**Author:** ]Eusèbe Salverte
**Date:** 1862-1864
**Imprint:** London: J.R.Smith

### Notes

It was noticed in <i>MP</i> (November 1864).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
